## Outcome

<!-- What user or maintainer outcome does this change produce? -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link an issue, or write "None" and explain why no issue is needed. -->

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI, packaging, or maintenance
- [ ] Security or privacy hardening

## Risk and boundaries

<!-- Note security, privacy, destructive-action, compatibility, or distribution impact. -->

## Breaking-change impact

<!-- State "None" or describe the affected API, behavior, migration, and release-note impact. -->

## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated focused tests for behavior changes
- [ ] `./script/check_open_source_readiness.sh`
- [ ] `swift test -Xswiftc -warnings-as-errors`
- [ ] `swift build -c release -Xswiftc -warnings-as-errors`
- [ ] Relevant exact-app or package smoke completed
- [ ] Public docs and changelog updated when guarantees changed
- [ ] No secrets, private paths, unredacted logs, generated bundles, or unrelated changes included

## Evidence

<!-- Commands, concise results, screenshots with sensitive data redacted, and known unverified gates. -->
